ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "bbl" TEXT /* Borough Block Lot (BBL) number of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the property */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total number of units in the property */,
  "stabilized_units_2007" INTEGER /* Number of stabilized units in the property as of 2007 */,
  "stabilized_units_2019" INTEGER /* Number of stabilized units in the property as of 2019 */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Sales price of the property */,
  "price_per_sq_foot" REAL /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next property inspection */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the owner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the owner was registered */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the owner's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the link is associated with */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., HPD, DOB, ACRIS, Taxes, OASIS) */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date the link was last checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_links_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Sales price of the property */,
  "price_per_sq_foot" REAL /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was closed */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing used */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan, if applicable */,
  "loan_interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan, if applicable */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in years, if applicable */,
  "source_of_funding" TEXT /* Source of funding for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the buyer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_type" TEXT /* Type of buyer */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the buyer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the buyer was registered */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the buyer's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the seller */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the seller */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the seller was registered */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the seller's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Number or identifier of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., apartment, commercial) */,
  "stabilized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the unit is stabilized */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the unit */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the unit */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the unit */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the unit */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection of the unit */,
  "unit_condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the unit */,
  "rent" REAL /* Current rent for the unit, if applicable */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_units_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the audit log is for */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit action was performed */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Type of audit action (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the audit action */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field that was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, real estate agent, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
